KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: Tariff pass-through to goods and sticky shelter likely kept May CPI elevated, but full 0.4%+ threshold still uncertain given some energy moderation.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: Above-trend monthly jump requiring broad-based acceleration across goods, services, and energy — possible but not the baseline scenario.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.6.reason: High monthly print would require simultaneous energy spike and tariff surge; slightly above Kalshi price due to tail-risk from tariff front-loading.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.7.reason: Very high monthly CPI would need a substantial supply shock; slightly above market reflecting non-trivial tariff escalation risk.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.8.reason: Extreme tail scenario requiring near-crisis inflation conditions; in line with market price.
